title: Bridge Essay: Transcending as a driver of development.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Transcending as adriver of development.** — Ann N Y Acad Sci. PMID: 27124274. DOI: 10.1111/nyas.13071. This paper draws from three different bodies of research to discuss the hypothesis that age-appropriate experiences enhance brain and cognitive development throughout the life span. These age-appropriate experiences could be considered as the drivers of development at each age, including drivers to foster development beyond adult abstract thinking, as described in Piaget'sformal operational stage. We explore how anurturing caregiver is the driver in the first 2 years of life, how language lear
